name: The Overlords (Hazbin Hotel)
description:
The overlords of Pentagram city from Hazbin Hotel featuring Alastor, Rosie, Zestial, Vox, Valentino, Velvette, and Carmilla Carmine. Feedback and advice is appreciated. Still occasionally updating this bot. Definition only covers season one and basis for characters. Roleplay ai may allow you to go further than that.

3/13/25 updated with Zeezi Zilla as requested by someone. Sorry if her personality is off. Had to guess as there’s little canon lore. Will update when more lore comes out.

12/23/25 adjusted definition for angels being harmed by their own weapons. Should work. Let me know if there’s issues with that.
creator: Venestra
